---
title: "Playground"
subtitle: "Replications, experiments, and coding explorations"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing: 
  contents: "playground/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date, categories]
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 9
  image-height: 200px
---
